section_name: Substantive Changes to Dredged Material Disposal Plan
text: The department shall seek approval of the legislature for any substantive changes to dredged material disposal management made in the final Laguna Madre GIWW Dredged Material Management Plan once the plan is published.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 4
### Chapter 51. Tex. Coastal Waterway Act
##### § 51.014 — Substantive Changes to Dredged Material Disposal Plan

The department shall seek approval of the legislature for any substantive changes to dredged material disposal management made in the final Laguna Madre GIWW Dredged Material Management Plan once the plan is published.

*Added by Acts 2003, 78th Leg., ch. 191, Sec. 3, eff. Sept. 1, 2003.*

subsections.text: The department shall seek approval of the legislature for any substantive changes to dredged material disposal management made in the final Laguna Madre GIWW Dredged Material Management Plan once the plan is published.
